recommendations.title: A Wonderful World
recommendations.overview: A fairy tale about the political and socioeconomic realities of Mexico.

recommendations.title: El Infierno
recommendations.overview: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommendations.title: ¡Que viva México!
recommendations.overview: After his grandfather's death, a man travels with his wife and kids to his hometown, where chaos ensues with his relatives over the inheritance.

recommendations.title: Herod's Law
recommendations.overview: In the 1940s, a small Mexican town has seen its last three mayors assassinated in rapid succession. A naive janitor is recruited to become the new mayor, and he believes he will modernize the little town and usher in a reign of peace. But the system

recommendations.title: Nightcrawler
recommendations.overview: When Lou Bloom, desperate for work, muscles into the world of L.A. crime journalism, he blurs the line between observer and participant to become the star of his own story. Aiding him in his effort is Nina, a TV-news veteran.

recommendations.title: Elections Day
recommendations.overview: The employees of a radio station in Moscow are forced to organize the elections campaign for a future governor in one of Russia districts.

recommendations.title: Game Change
recommendations.overview: During the Republican run of the 2008 Presidential election, candidate John McCain picks a relative unknown, Alaskan governor Sarah Palin, to be his running mate.  As the campaign kicks into high gear, her lack of experience, in both political and me

recommendations.title: Touch of Evil
recommendations.overview: A border-town bombing draws Mexican investigator Miguel Vargas into a corruption-ridden police investigation led by crooked captain Hank Quinlan, setting off a deadly struggle over power, justice, and truth.

recommendations.title: Olga
recommendations.overview: Based upon the true story of Olga Benário, the German-born wife of Brazilian communist leader Luís Carlos Prestes. During the dictatorship of Getúlio Vargas (1930-1945) she was arrested and sent to Nazi Germany, where she was put to death in a concen

recommendations.title: Second Tour
